steps.t: Shúkurz waits for you a little ways into the tunnel.
Shúkurz might have seen what you saw. It wouldn't hurt to ask him.
The Orcs are eager for a fight. You should try to communicate with Shúkurz... somehow.
You and Shúkurz have managed to obtain Dhúrstrok's location, all while escaping with your lives. But you've been noticing strange things.... You shoul…
